changes: Removed the visible clawdbot brew install metadata from SKILL.md frontmatter.
skills.reason: The benchmark container provides ffmpeg through the task setup service, and executor-visible skill metadata should not ask the model to install dependencies during the task.
unchanged: Skill name, user-facing instructions, helper script path, and ffmpeg requirement metadata remain otherwise unchanged.

changes: Added provider-aware default model selection for OpenAI-compatible transcription gateways, including vveai/Groq gateways where whisper-large-v3-turbo is the working model.
Added fallback from WHISPER_API_KEY/WHISPER_BASE_URL to OPENAI_API_KEY/OPENAI_BASE_URL when WHISPER_* is unset.
Added HTTP/API error validation so failed transcription responses do not get written as successful transcript text.
skills.reason: The benchmark uses live transcription credentials and may point at OpenAI-compatible gateways whose working model differs. The helper must avoid silently accepting provider errors as task outputs.
unchanged: Skill name, endpoint shape, curl-based workflow, flags, and output paths remain otherwise unchanged.
